description: Asset spec for Flex-with-Friends. Each entry drives the authoring-time ProceduralModel pipeline: generate_procedural_model(prompt) -> apply attributes -> place at zone origin + offset -> Save to File as scenery/<id>.rbxmx -> commit. See assets/README.md. The game runtime never reads this file; it is an authoring spec only.

Airport.note: Transit waypoint; boarding minigame. Mirrors Config.Zones.Airport.

assets.prompt: A modern two-story luxury influencer mansion with a large glass front, flat roof, balcony, and a welcoming open-plan ground floor. Clean, aspirational, bright.
assets.justification: Home lobby exterior/interior shell; idea doc: lobby is your home, upgradeable by follower count.

assets.prompt: A sleek modern smartphone standing upright on a small side table, screen glowing, for ordering food and services.
assets.justification: Overlays the Phone ProximityPrompt anchor in WorldService (HOME_INTERACTIONS Phone offset).

assets.prompt: A modern desktop computer on a tidy desk with a chair, monitor showing a social feed, for checking email, news and booking flights.
assets.justification: Overlays the Computer ProximityPrompt anchor in WorldService (HOME_INTERACTIONS Computer offset).

assets.prompt: A glossy black luxury taxi cab parked at the curb, four doors, ready to take the player to the airport.
assets.justification: Overlays the Cab ProximityPrompt anchor in WorldService (HOME_INTERACTIONS Cab offset); opens the travel picker.

assets.prompt: A friendly, athletic personal trainer NPC in workout clothes with a confident stance, holding a clipboard, ready to coach.
assets.justification: Matches Config.Npc.PersonalTrainer.SpawnOffset; the collectible NPC that runs the quiz minigame.

assets.prompt: A small bright modern airport terminal building with a curved glass facade, check-in counters, and a departures sign.
assets.justification: Airport zone backdrop for the boarding minigame.

assets.prompt: An airport boarding gate with a jet bridge, gate number sign, and a podium, marking where the player boards the plane.
assets.justification: Visual target for the timed boarding minigame (Config.Travel.MinigameWindow).

assets.prompt: A sleek private jet parked at the gate, white fuselage with a gold stripe, stairs down, ready for boarding.
assets.justification: The plane the player boards to travel to the Beach.

assets.prompt: An upscale beach cabana with a thatched roof, open sides, draped white curtains, and a small bar counter.
assets.justification: Beach destination centerpiece; photo backdrop for the photo system.

assets.prompt: A tall tropical palm tree with a curved trunk and full green fronds, casting a relaxed beach vibe.
assets.justification: Beach scenery; can be duplicated/positioned for a small grove.

assets.prompt: A luxury beach sun lounger with a striped cushion and a small side table holding a tropical drink.
assets.justification: Beach prop; pose spot for solo and co-op photos.

assets.prompt: A glamorous Mediterranean riviera waterfront with pastel villas tiered up a cliff, yachts in a marina, and palm-lined promenades.
assets.justification: Phase 2 place stub (idea doc roster). Schema-scale proof only; not built yet.

assets.prompt: A rooftop infinity pool on a glass high-rise overlooking a sprawling city skyline at golden hour, with sun beds and a glass railing.
assets.justification: Phase 2 place stub (idea doc roster). Schema-scale proof only; not built yet.
